name: Mocha Mint Mousse Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare brownie mix according to package directions in a greased 9-inch round pan; cool.
2. In a mixing bowl, dissolve instant coffee powder in hot water.
3. Add cream cheese to the mixture and beat until smooth.
4. Blend in marshmallow creme with an electric mixer.
5. Melt Junior Mints by heating them for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes in a microwave-safe bowl or stirring over low heat in a small saucepan. Stir until smooth; note that the chocolate will form slivers in the mixture.
6. Fold in melted Junior Mints into the batter.
7. Pour the mixture onto the cooled brownies and spread evenly.
8. Loosely cover and chill several hours or overnight.
9. To serve, cut into wedges and garnish as desired.
